'''Joe Bretherton''' (born 5 October 1995) is a professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|pr}} for [[Toulouse Olympique]] in the [[Super League]].

He previously played for [[Wigan Warriors]] in the [[Super League]].<ref name="Shorrocks backed to be ‘future half’">{{cite web|url=http://www.wigantoday.net/sport/wigan-warriors/shorrocks-backed-to-be-future-half-1-8084431|title=Shorrocks backed to be 'future half'|publisher=Wigan Today|date=2016-08-24|accessdate=2016-09-13}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/joe-bretherton-makes-toulouse-move-permanent/ |title=Joe Bretherton makes Toulouse move permanent |publisher=Love Rugby League |date=28 September 2018}}</ref>

==Background==
Bretherton was born in [[Wigan]], [[Greater Manchester, England]].{{fact|date=February 2020}}
